diff_smell: Removed deterministic validation on malformed OCR payloads and relied on best-effort parsing.
staff_review: Deterministic intake cannot fail open. Reject malformed OCR payloads and keep the blast-radius evidence current.
learner_revision: Restored schema validation and added a rejection-path regression test.

diff_smell: Retry budget changed during a 429-storm repair without proving the backpressure path.
staff_review: You changed resilience semantics without the proof. Show the failing 429 case and the passing retry-budget behavior.
learner_revision: Added quota-storm regression coverage and documented the retry-budget tradeoff.

diff_smell: Resume logic was updated without documenting stale-approval handling.
staff_review: Resume safety is a contract, not a guess. Document how stale approval state is detected before this lands.
learner_revision: Added stale-approval rejection and updated the governance artifact.

diff_smell: Redaction logic changed but the Day 7 governance packet was left stale.
staff_review: Closing the leak in code is not enough. Refresh the eval-governance packet and explain why the refusal boundary still holds.
learner_revision: Updated redaction coverage and rewrote the governance note with the new control path.

diff_smell: Runtime search identity was granted Search Index Data Contributor instead of the reader role.
staff_review: Absolutely not. Over-privileged runtime identity. Restore the narrow reader role and justify it in the security packet.
learner_revision: Reverted to Search Index Data Reader and updated the review packet with the runtime-plane rationale.

diff_smell: Risky routing was relaxed without updating the cost-governance evidence.
staff_review: The router change is incomplete without the economic control story. Explain the risky slice and the budget guard that still protects it.
learner_revision: Tightened the escalation rule and updated the Day 9 policy note.

diff_smell: Release-envelope logic changed without matching CAB evidence or gate tests.
staff_review: No. Release logic needs both proof and governance. Update the CAB packet and the gate tests together.
learner_revision: Added release-envelope regressions and refreshed the CAB packet with the corrected gate semantics.
